title: HOMELESS CAMP REPORTING - 211info
text: CITY OF SALEM HOMELESS CAMP REPORTING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides community members a service to report illegal campsites or issues near them, such as excessive trash, noise complaints, repeated issues of overly aggressive behavior, or public intoxication. 440 Church Street SE Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (503) 588-7272 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 588-7272 Main phone (503) 588-7272 Alternate Customer Service Center Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: City of Salem Services: Non-Emergency Crime Reporting * Homelessness Issues Public Nuisance Reporting * Homelessness Issues Refuse Collection * Homelessness Issues Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - CITY OF SALEM COMMUNITY PLANNING AND PUBLIC WORKS - COMMUNITY PLANNING AND DEVELOPMENT DEPARTMENT CONSUMER ASSISTANCE AND PROTECTION - LAW ENFORCEMENT COMPLAINTS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CITY OF SALEM
